title: Here’s What Happened in the War in Iran in Its Third Week
summary_full: The Persian new year and the end of the holy month of Ramadan were marked by continuing strikes in the region as the war reached the end of its third week.
summary_public: The Persian new year and the end of the holy month of Ramadan were marked by continuing strikes in the region as the war reached the end of its third week.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: War in Iran... continuing strikes in the region
